disclaimer: R14.2 lightweight rule-only baseline is not equivalent to Sun's full method.

components.required_fix: Implement Sun-style ModalityClassifier interface with deterministic fallback using extended marker lexicon
components.implementation_notes: No transformers/torch available. Interface-compatible fallback only. Mark explicitly as 'BERT component is interface-compatible fallback, not exact Sun trained BERT reproduction'.

components.required_fix: Implement marker-span heuristic approximation of tree patterns
components.implementation_notes: No spaCy/stanza/benepar available. Approximated by marker-position-based span rules. Document as 'constituency parsing unavailable; approximated by marker-span and dependency-like heuristic'.

components.required_fix: Implement subject-like heuristic: first NP before modality marker in clause
components.implementation_notes: No dependency parser available. Use word-position and marker-proximity heuristics.

components.required_fix: Create comprehensive marker lexicon covering modality/condition/constraint/exception/actor markers
components.implementation_notes: R14.2 had only 6 modality + 4 constraint markers. Expand to 50+ markers across 5 categories.

components.required_fix: Implement span-based rule templates that approximate Sun's tree patterns (SBAR/PP/NP/VP-based rules)
components.implementation_notes: Use marker positions as anchors. Apply span-level rules (marker + following clause, marker + preceding NP). Remove extracted spans from action computation.

components.required_fix: Add sun_alignment metadata block to each extraction record
components.implementation_notes: Output already has 6 fields. Add provenance metadata.

components.required_fix: Implement BPMN XML parser using xml.etree.ElementTree; create minimal fixture files
components.implementation_notes: Scaffold + fixtures only. Cannot reproduce Sun GDPR BPMN benchmark without original data.

components.required_fix: Implement field-level Jaccard matching between rule record and process semantic record
components.implementation_notes: Reuse existing Jaccard token similarity from evaluator.

components.required_fix: Compare extracted action against BPMN activity labels
Compare extracted actor against BPMN lane assignments
Compare constraint-implied ordering against BPMN sequence flow ordering
Cannot fix. Original Sun GDPR BPMN datasets not available.
components.implementation_notes: Use R14.1 24 draft mini-gold samples as local test set only.

components.required_fix: Not required for descriptive comparison. Keep existing evaluator.
components.implementation_notes: R14 field-level metrics are more granular than Sun's accuracy/F1 on compliance outcomes.
